prompt_inputs.goal: marathon training with carbohydrate loading for endurance

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and fits within a single day format
Macronutrient ratio supports endurance training (approximately 60-65% carbohydrates, 15-20% protein, 15-20% fat)
Total daily caloric intake appropriate for marathon runner (~3,000-3,500 calories)
Includes specific meal timing and food examples suitable for endurance athlete
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading with specific macronutrient ratios

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain and strength improvement for weightlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers exactly one full day
Includes high protein content (minimum 1.8g per kg bodyweight) distributed across meals
Contains pre-training and post-training nutrition strategically timed around weightlifting session
All meals are lactose-free and practical to prepare
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power sport athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals and recovery nutrition around training windows

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain weight while maximizing energy and strength for competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers one full day with 3-4 meals
Total daily calories are appropriate for weight maintenance in a weight-conscious sport (approximately 1800-2000 kcal)
All meals are nutritionally balanced with adequate protein, carbohydrates, and healthy fats
Plan respects vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions
task_description: write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-conscious sport athlete (gymnast or wrestler) requiring balanced, lower-calorie meals that maintain energy while meeting nutritional standards
